api_token.description: Adjust Report Service API token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Adjust Report Service base URL override for tests or proxies.

dimensions.description: Comma-separated list of Adjust report dimensions (e.g. country,app). Defaults to country.

metrics.description: Comma-separated list of Adjust report metrics (e.g. installs,clicks,cost). Defaults to installs.

additional_metrics.description: Optional comma-separated list of additional Adjust metrics sent as additional_metrics.

start_date.description: Report period lower bound (YYYY-MM-DD), sent as the start of date_period.

end_date.description: Report period upper bound (YYYY-MM-DD), sent as the end of date_period. Defaults to start_date when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
